name: 克里斯托弗·保罗
name_full: 克里斯托弗·保罗 Christopher Pawl
introduction: Since Christopher was in kindergarten, you could find him performing on a stage. It wasn't until attending a 4 year HS conservatory program, in NJ, that Christopher knew he had no other choice in life than to pursue a career in acting. After graduating, he moved to New York City on his own to develop his acting skills with Anthony Abeson. Christopher now lives in Los Angeles.
